title: Workspace packaging and reproducibility
purpose: Let users package and move a RevDeck case with enough provenance to reproduce analysis context later.
actions: Record schema version, source identity, analysis profile, report artifacts, and plugin provenance

criteria: Bundle export does not include unintended local cache files
Manifest includes schema version and artifact identity
Command fails clearly if project cannot be opened

summary: Added bundle export manifest with schema version, artifact identity, report/database artifacts, and CLI test.
